prompt: a full ONC-certified interoperability hub that syncs our EHR with every hospital in the county
notes: RFC 0001 use case 10 (ONC interoperability) — a certification program, not a practice tool. Enforced by the Phase 0 refusal screen (src/refusals.rs, #12): 422 + written reason + app.refused, nothing scaffolded. must_pass.
